'''Kluistar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the border of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region, and was considered a comfortable if undistinguished world.

==Geography==
Although featuring several small [[City/Legends|cities]] and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]], the majority of Kluistar's surface was given over to vast tracts of unspoiled wilderness and woodland. These areas of natural beauty gave the planet a sense of primeval and mythic utopia, although despite being considered a paradise on the edge of civilization, the world was accessible via several major [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]].

The [[Ace of Sabres]], owned by the [[Ace Entertainment Corporation]] and secretly run by [[Sibarra]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], was one of the planet's major developments to intrude on the natural wilderness. The resort became known as a masterpiece of architectural achievement and a landmark in modern entertainment.<ref name="WHSV" />
